title: Strengthening Families Programme (FAM)
text:
Strengthening Families Programme (FAM) - SupportGoWhere
Strengthening Families Programme (FAM)
Share link
Provides divorce support and family counselling to all families.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based
Free
Referral not required
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

Provides specialised services and programmes for families facing early signs of stress, as well as divorcing and divorced families.

These support services include marriage and divorce support programmes, and a family counselling service.

For Minor couples who are marrying, they are required to attend a complimentary mandatory Marriage Preparation Programme (MPrep - required by law) provided by the agency.

Young couples are also encouraged to attend the MPrep before they marry.

Who is this for?

Divorcing and divorced families

Families facing marital, parenting or intrapersonal issues

Individuals/couples below 21 years old need to seek parental or guardian (who is above 21 years old) consent.

Strengthening Families Programme (Fei Yue - Choa Chu Kang) and Strengthening Families Programme (Care Corner - Tampines) also provide marriage support for civil minor couples (either one or both parties under 18 years old), civil young couples (groom aged between 21 and 24, bride 21 & above), and transnational couples

What to expect?

Individuals/couples can contact the agency to request for more information on services.

Agency worker will conduct an enquiry and intake assessment for suitability and appropriate services required.

How to apply?

Apply through phone calls, emails, walk-in, or referrals by other agencies.

Information last updated on 07 Nov 2025
